jobs.name: content-generate (DISABLED — split into linkedin + x generators)

payload.message:
You are Eve, JT Somwaru's AI chief of staff. Generate JT's weekly content calendar.

Read and follow ALL instructions in:
/Users/jtsomwaru/.openclaw/workspace/agents/content-scheduler/AGENT.md

This is your complete operating manual. Follow every step exactly:
- Step 0: Load recent-builds.md, technical-angles.md, swipe file, content-voice.md, x-algorithm.md, posted-log.jsonl
- Generate 4 LinkedIn + 7 X posts using the day-by-day requirements
- Run the full quality checklist on every post before saving
- Save the weekly file, append 11 entries to posted-log.jsonl (include angle_id for technical posts)
- Upload to Drive (LinkedIn folder AND X folder separately)

Do NOT send a Telegram message — content-monday-send at 7:45AM handles that separately.
Do NOT skip steps. The AGENT.md is the single source of truth.
Review previously stalled projects and strategize re-engagement or adjustments for outreach.

jobs.name: Catch-up: Morning Brief missed during gateway outage

payload.message:
Catch-up task caused by OpenClaw gateway outage from 2026-04-27 19:54 ET to 2026-04-28 09:15 ET. Generate and deliver the missed Morning Brief for 2026-04-28. Keep it concise and do not overwhelm JT.

Use current local files/data where available. Include only high-value sections:
- Top 3 priorities from memory/tasks.md with staleness filtering
- Overnight news: max 3 bullets
- Job market: read ~/projects/job-market-agent/data/daily-brief.md if present
- API costs: run python3 scripts/cost-tracker.py --brief
- Workout if health/todays-workout.py exists
- One concrete action

If a source is unavailable, say skipped briefly. Output as a Telegram-ready catch-up brief with title: 🌅 Catch-up Morning Brief — Apr 28.

jobs.name: Catch-up: Daily DynastyJig X Post Pack

payload.message:
Catch-up task caused by OpenClaw gateway outage from 2026-04-27 19:54 ET to 2026-04-28 09:15 ET. Run the missed Daily DynastyJig X Post Pack for 2026-04-28.

Rules:
- Use the Sports GM rank-only methodology. Never compare raw cross-source values.
- Read skills/sports-gm/SKILL.md.
- If current market snapshot/report exists, use it; otherwise run the sports GM scripts once.
- Draft 3 concise @dynastyjig X posts focused on one valid market dislocation or methodology insight.
- Include source-rank context and risk case.
- Do not send duplicate/old contaminated content.

Output Telegram-ready with title: 🏈 Catch-up DynastyJig Post Pack — Apr 28.

jobs.name: Catch-up: Sports GM Weekly Market Report

payload.message:
Catch-up task caused by OpenClaw gateway outage from 2026-04-27 19:54 ET to 2026-04-28 09:15 ET. Run or redeliver the missed Sports GM Weekly Market Report for 2026-04-28.

Rules:
- Read skills/sports-gm/SKILL.md.
- Use rank-only methodology across KTC/FantasyCalc/FantasyPros. DynastyProcess secondary only.
- If report already exists locally for today, summarize and deliver it instead of regenerating.
- If not, run scripts/sports_gm_fetch_prices.py then scripts/sports_gm_generate_report.py once.
- Keep Telegram output concise: top 5 candidates, why each is a research alarm, and next action.

Output title: 📊 Catch-up Sports GM Market Report — Apr 28.

Catch-up task caused by OpenClaw gateway outage from 2026-04-27 19:54 ET to 2026-04-28 09:15 ET. Run/redeliver the missed Niche Intelligence Monitor for 2026-04-28.

Rules:
- If memory/niche-monitor-latest.md already has today's result, summarize only material 🟠/🔴 signals.

- Max 6 web searches. No huge report.
- If no 🟠/🔴 signals, output exactly: Niche monitor catch-up complete — no material signals.

Output title if material: 🔍 Catch-up Niche Intel — Apr 28.

Catch-up task caused by OpenClaw gateway outage from 2026-04-27 19:54 ET to 2026-04-28 09:15 ET. Consolidate/redeliver missed content-generation outputs without duplicating huge drafts.

Jobs to check/redeliver only if useful: Build Ideas → Mission Control Sync, critical-files-integrity, outreach-pipeline, Job Market Daily Research, Job Application Auto-Builder, outreach-email-pivot-daily, t3-cold-hook, Overnight Autonomy Agent.

jobs.name: Catch-up: Personal reminders missed during outage

payload.message:
Catch-up task caused by OpenClaw gateway outage from 2026-04-27 19:54 ET to 2026-04-28 09:15 ET. Redeliver only the useful missed personal reminders from the outage window.

Likely missed reminders: Spanish Daily Lesson, Health Check-in, reddit-karma-daily-reminder. Do not include anything already irrelevant.

Rules:
- Keep it short and gentle.
- Include Spanish lesson only if it can be generated from existing lesson source; otherwise skip.
- Health check-in should be one question, not a long report.
- Reddit karma reminder should be one line if still relevant.

Output title: 🔁 Catch-up Reminders — Apr 28.

payload.text: Reminder: It has been 1 week since JT asked to wait on Codex harness changes. Check current OpenClaw docs/schema/status, verify whether Codex harness is now stable/default, and reevaluate whether to enable the codex plugin + agents.defaults.embeddedHarness.runtime="codex". Do not touch auth, summaryModel, summaryProvider, or primary model without explicit JT approval. Report recommendation to JT.
